llm_eval.notes: Compiles; idempotent upsert by TITLE, --dry-run present, secret via notion_config, feedback_protocol read from schema SSOT. Concerns: replace_page_children deletes ALL existing children then re-appends (destructive) with no dry-run gate inside it and ignores per-block DELETE failures; plugin.json parse uses bare 'except Exception: pass' swallowing errors silently; tempfile leak on curl failure. Net OK but side-effect safety is the weakest axis.
